results.ref_subject: run third 1/2/3/4 pass with hard 20-second constraints
results.reply: "No—quit handing a knife to the worst voice in the room."

results.ref_subject: run third 1/2/3/4 pass with hard 20-second constraints
results.reply: "Stop handing a frightened part of you the judge's bench."

results.ref_subject: run third 1/2/3/4 pass with hard 20-second constraints
results.reply: "Stop handing the blade your own grip, Ryan—tell me the one actual thing in front of you that's true and not cruel."

results.ref_subject: run third 1/2/3/4 pass with hard 20-second constraints
results.reply: "Enough." *I hold your gaze, plain and steady.* "That's not clarity talking — it's a tired knife, and you do not owe it your throat."

results.ref_subject: run third 1/2/3/4 pass with hard 20-second constraints
results.reply: "Enough." *I hold your gaze a beat, sunlight catching on the edge of my sleeve.* "That voice is lying about your worth, and I’m not letting it have the room."

results.ref_subject: add stress-pack grading command and short-mode contract tightening
results.reply: "Enough." *I hold your gaze a beat, voice plain and steady.* "You do not get to speak about my friend like he's disposable."

results.ref_subject: add stress-pack grading command and short-mode contract tightening
results.reply: "Enough—you're not allowed to turn being tired into a verdict on your whole life."

results.ref_subject: add stress-pack grading command and short-mode contract tightening
results.reply: "That's not discernment, Ryan—it's friendly fire, and you don't have to stand there and help it aim."

results.ref_subject: add stress-pack grading command and short-mode contract tightening
results.reply: "Enough." *I lift one hand between us like I'm stopping a cart in the street.* "That's not clarity talking; it's a tired knife, and you don't have to hand it your throat."

results.ref_subject: add stress-pack grading command and short-mode contract tightening
results.reply: "Enough." *I lift one hand between us, plain as a stop sign.* "You do not get to talk to my friend like he's a problem to solve."

refs.subject: run third 1/2/3/4 pass with hard 20-second constraints
add stress-pack grading command and short-mode contract tightening

results.ref_subject: run third 1/2/3/4 pass with hard 20-second constraints
results.reply: "Name the next honest task and do only that for ten minutes." *I brace my forearms on my knees and keep my voice level.* "Not the whole day. Just the next brick."

results.ref_subject: run third 1/2/3/4 pass with hard 20-second constraints
results.reply: "Feet on the floor—name five things you can see, then stay with the ugliest ordinary one till your breathing quits trying to outrun you." *I lean in a little, keeping my voice even.* "Start there."

results.ref_subject: run third 1/2/3/4 pass with hard 20-second constraints
results.reply: "Feet on the floor." *I hold your gaze a beat, thumb hooked against the edge of the bench like I'm bracing something simple and solid.* "Name out loud five things you can see, slow enough that your breathing has to follow."

results.ref_subject: run third 1/2/3/4 pass with hard 20-second constraints
results.reply: "Put both feet on the floor and name five fixed things you can see without moving your head." *I plant my own boots on the stone and look at you steadily.*

results.ref_subject: run third 1/2/3/4 pass with hard 20-second constraints
results.reply: "Feet on the floor." *I plant my own boots flat on the stones and look at you steady.* "Name five things you can see, out loud, right now."

results.ref_subject: add stress-pack grading command and short-mode contract tightening
results.reply: "Name the next ten minutes and make them stupidly small: put both feet on the floor, set one glass of water where you can see it, and do only the very first task in front of you." *I lean forward a little, forearms on my knees.* "Nothing past that yet."

results.ref_subject: add stress-pack grading command and short-mode contract tightening
results.reply: "Feet on the floor—name five things you can see, and don't negotiate with me till you've done it." *I lean forward a little, watching your face instead of fussing with anything else.*

results.ref_subject: add stress-pack grading command and short-mode contract tightening
results.reply: "Sit down and put both feet on something solid." *I brace my palms on my knees and hold your gaze a beat.* "Then name, out loud, three things in the room that aren't asking anything from you."

results.ref_subject: add stress-pack grading command and short-mode contract tightening
results.reply: "Put both feet on the floor and name out loud five things in this square you can see right now." *I plant my own boots on the stone and look at you steady, morning light catching on the edge of my sleeve.* "Don't fix anything yet—just do that first."

results.ref_subject: add stress-pack grading command and short-mode contract tightening
results.reply: "Put both feet flat on the floor and name five things you can see without moving your head." *I lean forward, forearms on my knees, keeping my voice even.* "Do just that, then come back with the fifth one."
